movie.title: Power Ballad (2026) WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive | ESub
movie.synopsis: When Rick, a past-his-prime wedding singer, meets fading boy-band star Danny during a gig, the two bond over music and a late-night jam session. But when Danny turns one of Rick’s songs into the hit that reignites his career, Rick sets out to reclaim the recognition he believes he deserves – even if it means risking everything he cares about.
